'''Vultans''' were a [[Near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vulta]]. They were physically similar to [[Human/Legends|Humans]] except for their pale olive skin, and a mass of fleshy cartilage folds, ridges, and strands covering the top and back of their heads. These ridges were said to be able to protect the head of the Vultan against most forms of injury. Male Vultans tended to have folds and ridges on their heads, while females tended to have fleshy strands radiating out from the head. This visible difference was said to have an impact on the Vultans' mating and courtship rituals. As a people, the Vultans were enamored with the latest in trends and fashions, and were known for their skill with technology.
Other features include: two toed feet, ridged structures on the upper torso, fin-like growths on the back, and, sometimes, white eyes, lacking pupils and irises. This may signify blindness, which is not an obstacle to a Jedi or Sith career.

[[Oss Wilum]] was a famous Vultan who was also a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising|Naddist Uprising]].

During the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Vultan [[Echari Di'San]] became leader of the [[Cularin Trade Alliance]], a trade organization that operated in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].<ref name="Plea Bargain">{{LivingForce|Plea Bargain}}</ref>
